title: vandenboschia johnstonensis
intro: Vandenboschia johnstonensis, also known as the Johnston's spleenwort, is a species of fern native to the island of Kauai in Hawaii. It is a type of epiphytic fern that grows on tree trunks, utilizing them for support, and has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. The leaves of Vandenboschia johnstonensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, which is believed to offer various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-aging effects, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
